layoutRegions.name: escalation-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Track late receipts, owner pages, checksum fixes, and sealed rollback packets.

layoutRegions.name: escalation-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare receipt escalations by owner, breach timer, paging channel, status, and progress.

layoutRegions.name: receipt-closeout-workspace
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect breach timers, delegated owner paging, retry transcripts, checksum reconciliation, reviewer evidence, and rollback packets.

components.name: MetricTile
components.purpose: Compact escalation counter with semantic status tone.

components.name: EscalationCard
components.purpose: Late receipt escalation card showing breach timer, paging channel, status, and progress.
interactions: status chip maps to escalation state

components.name: ChecksumRow
components.purpose: Reconciliation row comparing expected and observed packet hashes before closeout.
interactions: hash values remain readable at narrow widths
row layout does not shift when state changes

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button and status row has a visible focus or stable hover-safe presentation.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
